name: chain_how_i_built_1520k_vibecoding_agency_as
method: How I built $15-20k vibecoding agency as non-technical history undergrad

stages.task: Scrape Upwork/Reddit/IndieHackers for prospects requesting app builds, MVP development, or website creation
Score prospects by budget signals ($500+ mentioned), urgency (deadline language), and scope fit (can be AI-built in <1 week)
Generate personalized proposal using Claude referencing prospect's specific need, estimated timeline, and portfolio of existing PRINTMAXX app builds as proof
Send proposals via platform DM or cold email, log responses
